lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

answers: A giant champion soldier from the Philistines
One man fights him; the loser’s people serve the winner
A race across the battlefield – the loser dies
Whoever can lift the heaviest rock wins
A dance contest – the winner became king

questions.text: For how many days did Goliath challenge Israel?
Why did David go to the battlefield?
answers: To bring food and check on his brothers

questions.text: Why did David believe he could defeat Goliath?
answers: God had helped him defeat lions and bears

questions.text: Why didn’t David use Saul’s armor?
What did Goliath do when he saw David?
answers: He made fun of him and cursed God
He kicked him and sent him flying away

questions.text: What lesson did David say God would teach through this battle?
answers: That God doesn’t need weapons because He is the true God
That Israel is the strongest nation
That slings are better than spears

questions.text: What weapon did David use, and where did he strike Goliath?
answers: A sling; he struck Goliath in the head
A sword; he struck Goliath's arm
A spear; he struck Goliath's leg
A bow and arrow; he pierced Goliath's ear

questions.text: What did the Philistines do after Goliath was defeated?
